requirement_title: Google OAuth hidden for unauthorized origin
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
coverage_items: Visible--check_origin[current origin is not in authorizedRedirects]/hide OAuth controls-->Hidden

requirement_title: Google OAuth hidden for unauthorized origin
title: Verify OAuth controls hidden for unauthorized origin (EP)
precondition: User is on a page containing OAuth controls; authorizedRedirects list includes 'https://trusted.com' (and excludes other origins).
test_steps:
Set current_origin to an unauthorized value (e.g., 'https://evil.com')
Load the page
Check the visibility of OAuth controls

requirement_title: Google OAuth hidden for unauthorized origin
title: Verify OAuth controls hidden when origin is not authorized (DT rule 1)
precondition: User is on a page containing OAuth controls; authorizedRedirects list includes 'https://trusted.com' (and excludes other origins).
test_steps:
Set current_origin to 'https://evil.com' (origin not in authorizedRedirects)
Confirm the condition 'current origin is not in authorizedRedirects' evaluates to true
Load the page
Verify OAuth controls are hidden
expected_result: OAuth controls are hidden (action: Hide OAuth controls)
